subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Chronic Inflammation
description: A micro-lesson that makes Chronic Inflammation usable.

hook.text: Acute inflammation heals you. Chronic inflammation slowly destroys you.

buildup.text: When inflammation doesn't shut off, it damages healthy tissue over months and years.

discovery.text: Chronic inflammation is linked to heart disease, diabetes, cancer, and Alzheimer's.

twist.text: Lifestyle factors—stress, poor sleep, bad diet—keep inflammation simmering indefinitely.

climax.text: Anti-inflammatory diets, exercise, and sleep can reduce chronic inflammation measurably.

punchline.text: Short inflammation saves. Endless inflammation kills. Know the difference.

quiz.question: What distinguishes chronic inflammation from acute inflammation?
options: It persists long-term and damages healthy tissue
